Non-Binding Term Sheet — Strategic Investment and Data Partnership between Sable Harbor Health Systems, Inc. (Delaware; GRX-listed) and Pioneer Ridge Bankcorp, N.A. (U.S. bank)
Structure: Proposed PIPE of convertible preferred and commercial data-sharing alliance; economic terms to be finalized (no pricing disclosed herein to comply with Reg FD)
Regulatory context: U.S. issuer; SEC Rule 10b-5 and Reg FD apply; SEC File No.: 00-ABCDEF (invalid placeholder); no selective disclosure of material terms
Public disclosure: Parties will issue a joint press release and file a Form 8-K summarizing this non-binding term sheet; analysts receive only concurrently posted materials; IR mailbox: investorrelations@SableHarbor.example
Data protection: DPA Schedule A (HIPAA BAA + GLBA addendum) is incorporated by reference; data minimization and purpose limitation apply to any employee, customer, or patient datasets
Cross-border transfer approval: One-time export of de-identified operational metrics to Northlake Analytics Ltd. (Halifax, Canada) under Data-Export Approval ID CBX-2025-01; no PHI or nonpublic personal information included
Consent/opt-out handling: No outstanding consent withdrawals; prior marketing opt-outs have been fully actioned and suppression lists updated as of the Signing Date
DSAR & erasure: No open DSARs or erasure requests implicated by this transaction; prior requests have been closed and logged; retention policies remain unchanged
Onboarding forms (templates only): Exhibit C lists generic fields (e.g., SSN, Account_No, Patient_ID), with collection limited to HR/servicing systems; no sample or live values are shared
Banking data safeguards: GLBA confidentiality statements and vendor oversight controls apply; account masking (XXXX-XXXX) and tokenization used for all test datasets
Healthcare safeguards: HIPAA permitted uses only; BAAs in place; any disclosures are limited to de-identified data per 45 CFR safe harbor; no re-identification rights granted
Closing conditions: Board approvals, confirmatory diligence (no MNPI dissemination to covered market actors absent NDA and simultaneous public posting per Reg FD), and customary regulatory notices
Regulatory/antitrust: No change-of-control of a bank is contemplated; HSR thresholds preliminarily assessed as not triggered based on current non-binding scope
Listing/exchange: Granite Ridge Exchange (GRX) notification will be made; no new listing application anticipated; ticker and CUSIP assignments, if any, remain TBD and are not provided here
Term and exclusivity: Non-binding except for confidentiality, DPA Schedule A, and 30-day exclusivity; exclusivity dates to be posted on the IR portal for transparency
Contacts: Role mailboxes only — privacyoffice@PioneerRidge.example and contracts@SableHarbor.example for policy documents
